channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Bombay High Court Issues Injunction Prohibiting Hackers From Publishing Allegedly Hacked HDFC Investor Data
item.description: The Bombay High Court granted interim relief to HDFC AMC after a ransomware group called “Morpheus” allegedly stole over 680 GB of sensitive company and investor data. The court barred unidentified ha...

item.title: Dutch Authorities Dismantle Botnet Linked to 17 Million Infected Devices
item.description:
Dutch authorities have announced the takedown of a botnet that enslaved millions of infected devices, including computers, tablets, smartphones, and IoT devices, to carry out malicious attacks.
The b...
